summary: Implemented Bootstrap Model-Family Separation enforcement in bandit validate. Created src/state/model-family-separation.ts with inactive-gate historical compatibility, fail-closed policy/template/evidence validation when the gate is active, and the acceptance-criteria checks for Stage 2 ownership, model-family separation, Claude bootstrap routing, forbidden Writer test-surface edits, contaminated-attempt invalidation, and Codex PM escalation routing. Wired the validator into src/commands/validate.ts. Created the committed policy, template, and BANDIT-047 evidence artifacts required for the gate to pass on the main repo.

verification.affected_tests: node --test test/landing-gates.test.mjs test/local-qwen-review.test.mjs test/validate.test.mjs test/bootstrap-gaps.test.mjs test/artifact-create.test.mjs test/draft-work.test.mjs test/work-item-create.test.mjs
